item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 151400Z AUTO 32012KT CAVOK 13/05 Q1008 TEMPO VRB15G30KT 2000 -TSRA BKN030CB
🟡 TAF LFOT 151100Z 1512/1612 34005KT 9999 FEW040 TEMPO 1512/1520 4000 -SHRA BKN030TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1514/1518 VRB15G30KT 2000 -TSRA BKN030CB BECMG 1518/1521 26004KT PROB30 TEMPO 1603/1606 4000 BR
